Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Dedicates a portion of the state highway system to Edward "Red" Corrigan
Summary: Dedicates a bridge on state route 112 over state route 27 to Edward "Red" Corrigan in the town of Patchogue, county of Suffolk.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to dedicating a portion of the state highway system to Edward "Red" Corrigan
